zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Kerber於1566年3月出生在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根時，他的父親Ansel Kerber37歲，母親Margaretha Darmsheimer37歲。他於1588年11月25日與Caterina Reisers在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Kerber于1566年3月出生在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根时，他的父亲Ansel Kerber37岁，母亲Margaretha Darmsheimer37岁。他于1588年11月25日与Caterina Reisers在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kerber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Körber (see Korber ) or Gerber .

variants.name: Korber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Körber): occupational name for a basketmaker, from an agent derivative of Korb . Compare Koerber .
Slovenian: variant of   Korbar  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Kerber was born in March 1566, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Ansel Kerber, was 37 and his mother, Margaretha Darmsheimer, was 37. He married Caterina Reisers on 25 November 1588, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1609, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Kerber est né en mars 1566, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Ansel Kerber, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaretha Darmsheimer, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Caterina Reisers le 25 novembre 1588, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Kerber im März 1566 in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ansel Kerber 37 und seine Mutter Margaretha Darmsheimer 37. Er hat am 25. November 1588 in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland Caterina Reisers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1609 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Kerber è nato il nel marzo 1566 nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Ansel Kerber, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha Darmsheimer, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Caterina Reisers il 25 novembre 1588, nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Kerberが1566年3月にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンで生まれた時，父Ansel Kerberは37歳，母Margaretha Darmsheimerは37歳であった。1588年11月25日にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンでCaterina Reisersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.Zochenreuth, Aufseß, Bayreuth, Oberfrank: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 베이레우스 오프세ss 즈옥헨레우스
ko.lifeSummary: Michael Kerber(이)가 1566년 3월 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ansel Kerber(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha Darmsheimer(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1588년 11월 25일 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 Caterina Reisers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Kerber nasceu em março de 1566, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Ansel Kerber, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha Darmsheimer, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Caterina Reisers em 25 de novembro de 1588, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.Zochenreuth, Aufseß, Bayreuth, Oberfrank: зочэнреут, ауфсеss, ландкрис беиреут, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Kerber родился марта 1566 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Ansel Kerber было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha Darmsheimer, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Caterina Reisers 25 ноября 1588 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1609 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Kerber nació en marzo de 1566, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Ansel Kerber, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaretha Darmsheimer, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Caterina Reisers el 25 de noviembre de 1588, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1609, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
